steps.code:
<?php 
require_once 'wp-load.php';

// 1. Setup Permalinks
update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/');

// 2. Set Front Page
$home = get_page_by_path('sample-page');
if ($home) {
	update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
	update_option('page_on_front', $home->ID);
}

// 3. Generate Content with FakerPress (if available)
if ( class_exists( 'FakerPress\Module\Post' ) ) {
    \$module = new FakerPress\Module\Post();
    \$module->generate( array(
        'qty' => array( 8, 12 ),
        'post_type' => 'post',
        'post_status' => 'publish',
        'post_author' => array( 1 ),
        'faker_images' => array( 'attachment_id' => true ),
        'faker_image_provider' => 'picsum',
        'faker_image_size' => '1024x682',
    ) );
}

// 4. Cleanup : Deactivate FakerPress to keep the demo focused
deactivate_plugins( 'fakerpress/fakerpress.php' );
